title: GHZ
description: GHZ state preparation and verification benchmark. Constructs a GHZ state on the device using a BFS spanning tree of the device connectivity, then estimates a fidelity lower bound via direct fidelity estimation (DFE) or parity oscillation.

benchmark_name.description: Name of the benchmark. Must be 'GHZ' for this schema.

num_qubits.description: Number of data qubits for the GHZ state.

shots.description: Number of measurement shots per circuit.

method.description: Verification method: 'dfe' (2 circuits, fast) or 'parity_oscillation' (many circuits, rigorous).

num_phases.description: Number of phase points for parity oscillation method. Ignored for DFE.

num_flag_qubits.description: Number of flag qubits for error detection via ZZ stabilizer checks. Set to 0 to disable.
